metadata.title: Moisture niche breadth and spatial organization of flower-colour variation
metadata.description: Code, analytical data, evidence provenance and supporting outputs for a comparative analysis of whether documented within-population flower-colour polymorphism and geographically structured flower-colour variation differ in realised climatic niche breadth. The archive reports exploratory, non-causal associations and includes occurrence-sampling and phylogenetic sensitivity analyses.
metadata.notes: Archived from frozen Git commit REPLACE_WITH_COMMIT_SHA. Broad GBIF download DOI: REPLACE_WITH_GBIF_DOWNLOAD_DOI. Exact-subset GBIF Derived Dataset DOI: REPLACE_WITH_GBIF_DERIVED_DATASET_DOI.
